---
title: "Teaching"
---

I received the George Washington University Department of Political Science award for best teaching assistant in writing-intensive 'Writing in the Disciplines' courses (2023).

## George Washington University

- PSC 1012W: Introduction to Politics II (Writing in the Disciplines), Teaching Assistant - Spring 2024, 2025.
- PSC 2994: Global Governance, Teaching Assistant - Fall 2023.
- PSC 1003: Introduction to International Politics, Teaching Assistant - Fall 2022, Spring 2023.
